financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is making more money steadily and using its funds wisely to grow.
It has a variety of products and smart purchases that keep its earnings strong.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company is doing well in managing risks, but it still faces challenges like strict rules and possible cyber-attacks.
Efforts to improve supply chain issues are in place, but global operations make it hard to avoid all disruptions.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its leadership.
They are also performing well in how they treat people and communities, but there's room for improvement.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company has a lot of cash and credit available, which keeps it financially strong.
Even though they are using more borrowed money, they are still seen as financially healthy by experts.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders clearly explain their plans and successes, making it easy to understand how they are growing and improving.
They provide detailed numbers and future goals, showing they are open and honest about their business progress and direction.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company has a strong plan focusing on innovation and growth, which is why it scored high.
They need to watch out for competition and rules in different markets to keep succeeding.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well because it has made smart business deals and is growing in many countries.
There are some risks, like more competition and possible rule changes, but overall the company is in a strong position.
